patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) validated 5+ consecutive times with no exceptions; PHI@PIT (-3.86pp), NYY@NYM (-1.98pp), SD@SEA (-6.80pp) all correctly capped today — do not re-litigate when the cap fires.

PLATINUM with unconfirmed SP edge + PQI strongly against pick (Δ < -25) = reliable DOWNGRADE to GOLD; TOR@DET (PQI Δ=-29.3) and BOS@ATL (no F1 signal, Strider 0 Statcast pitches) both match this pattern.

Stacked pipeline flags (bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade) without secondary confirming signal (f5_full_delta <0.15, fair_prob disagreement <12pp, fair_prob >0.42) do NOT mandate DOWNGRADE on positive-edge picks — validated 05-12 CHC@ATL and 05-13 SD@MIL.

Extreme f5_full_delta at Coors Field (ARI@COL: 0.3232, COL wins F5 at 89.21%) is a park-effect modeling artifact — the f5 model over-weights Coors home advantage; OVERRIDE to ARI not warranted without stacked flags, but GOLD tier is indefensible with F3=306.6.

PLATINUM + f5_full_delta approaching 0.20 + no F1 SP signal is the early-warning form of HARD CAP 3; BOS@ATL (delta=0.1831, Strider returning with 0 Statcast pitches) mirrors the SF@LAD artifact pattern before the cap threshold is fully met — one tier reduction is prudent.

PHI @ PIT.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly fires: edge=-3.86pp collapses GOLD to B- (score 4→1), zeroing stake. Pre-cap A- driven by F1_xera_gap=2.20* (Ashcraft thin sample) and PQI=+22.4 favoring PIT. Aaron Nola pitching for PHI is qualitatively concerning but the negative edge already encodes the market's Nola premium. The asterisk on F1 signals thin Statcast sample for Ashcraft — SP comparison is partially unreliable. Cap correctly handles this tradeoff; PIT direction credible but not stakeable.

BAL @ WSH.reasoning: Grade D (score=-1): SP edge 2.99 xERA AGAINST WSH (Baz rated better than Littell) and PQI strongly against pick (Δ=-28.7). Only F3=2968.9 supports WSH direction. fair_prob=0.4206 means market prices WSH at only 42.06% despite model picking them at 56.48%. The structural quality signals all point BAL; D grade correctly reflects the failure. No staking basis.

TOR @ DET.reasoning: DOWNGRADE PLATINUM→GOLD. PLATINUM historical hit rate 43%; SP edge explicitly 'unconfirmed' in grade_reasons. PQI AGAINST DET at Δ=-29.3 is the largest contra-PQI on the slate — late-game degradation strongly disfavors DET in the full game. F2+F3 fire and edge=+8.22pp support direction; three-signal GOLD bar is met, so GOLD (not SKIP) is the correct landing tier. Yesavage (TOR) has shown inconsistency in prior postgame record; DET direction remains sound at reduced conviction.

CIN @ CLE.reasoning: Grade A (score=5), edge=+6.77pp in band. F1_xera_gap=1.30* (Bibee/Abbott thin sample) is backed by F5_bullpen_gap=+0.87 — HARD CAP 5 does NOT fire since F5 provides the required secondary signal. PQI=+14.9 confirms CLE. bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade present, but per validated 05-12/05-13 rule, stacked flags without secondary signal (f5_full_delta=0.0498, fair_prob disagreement=6.78pp — both well below thresholds) do NOT mandate DOWNGRADE. Tanner Bibee is CLE's quality home SP. CONFIRM GOLD.

MIA @ TB.reasoning: SKIP correctly applied: edge=+1.28pp outside [4,15]pp band. Grade D (score=-2): SP edge 0.39 xERA AGAINST TB (Junk rated better than Scholtens), PQI AGAINST pick (Δ=-11.1). bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked. TB is 28-14 (quality team) but today's matchup signals all run counter to the directional pick. No basis for conviction.

BOS @ ATL.reasoning: DOWNGRADE PLATINUM→GOLD. f5_full_delta=0.1831 approaches the 0.20 calibration-artifact threshold; f5_prob=0.4823 (ATL only 48.23% in F5 despite Strider starting) strongly implies the model lacks Strider's Statcast data — no F1 signal fires, confirming SP edge uncomputed. This mirrors the SF@LAD PLATINUM artifact pattern before HARD CAP 3 fires. ATL's 30-14 record vs BOS 18-25 and F3=5680.9 support direction; GOLD (not SKIP) given genuine team quality edge. BOS's Connelly Early is exploitable.

NYY @ NYM.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires: edge=-1.98pp collapses GOLD to B- (score 4→1). Pre-cap A- with F1_xera_gap=2.38* (Schlittler thin sample) + F2=0.033 and PQI confirms. confidence_downgrade=True. NYY is 27-17, NYM 18-25 — quality advantage real but negative edge means market has priced it. Clay Holmes (NYM SP) is a converted reliever; uncertainty warranted. Grade D (score=-2): SP edge 0.53 xERA AGAINST CHC (Burke rated over Cabrera), PQI AGAINST pick (Δ=+8.4). f5_full_delta=0.1231 moderate — CHW wins F5 at 61.95% but model picks CHC for full game, requiring a late-inning reversal. No stacked flags to trigger OVERRIDE to CHW. CHC at barely 50.35% model confidence with all quality signals negative.

TEX @ HOU.reasoning: Grade D (score=-1): SP edge 0.79 xERA AGAINST HOU (Leiter rated over Arrighetti), PQI AGAINST pick (Δ=-10.1). acute_roster=True + confidence_downgrade=True stacked. All structural signals favor TEX; HOU direction at barely 50.61% model confidence is not credible.

KC @ STL.reasoning: Grade D (score=-3), lowest on today's slate. SP edge 1.00 xERA AGAINST STL (Wacha rated substantially over Dustin May) and PQI AGAINST pick (Δ=-18.0). Despite model's 65% full-game probability for STL, every structural quality signal runs KC. Michael Wacha for KC has a strong quality edge per xERA. fair_prob=0.5093 implies market sees this as near-coin-flip despite model's STL conviction. D grade + score=-3 = SKIP with no hesitation.

ARI @ COL.reasoning: DOWNGRADE GOLD→SKIP. f5_full_delta=0.3232 is the largest Stage 1/2 gap on today's slate — COL wins F5 at 89.21% but only 56.89% full game. At Coors Field this magnitude is a park-effect artifact: the F5 model over-weights altitude home advantage, producing an implausible 89% F5 probability. F3=306.6 is near noise floor (weak sole directional signal). Grade B (score=2) already reflects the Stage 1/2 MAJOR disagree penalty. OVERRIDE to ARI not warranted (no stacked flags, fair_prob=0.4585 >0.42 floor), but GOLD tier is unjustifiable at F3=306.6 with this delta.

However, Snell has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — the 100+ pitch threshold for SP quality scoring is not met. PENDING designation is correct; without Snell's SP quality score, the F1 SP edge cannot be computed and the pick remains ungraded. LAD is 26-18 vs LAA 16-28 — directional lean to LAD qualitatively, but no formalizable pick.

SF @ OAK.reasoning: DOWNGRADE PLATINUM→GOLD. Highest score on slate (7) with F2+F3=5371.0 both firing, edge=+6.15pp, PQI=+6.1, Stage 1/2 align (delta=0.0993 <0.15). However: PLATINUM 43% historical rate; SP edge 'unconfirmed' per grade_reasons; bullpen_fatigue on pick side (ATH's bullpen is tired — if Civale exits early, fatigued pen must hold). Stacked flags alone without secondary signal normally don't mandate DOWNGRADE (per 05-12 lesson), but PLATINUM scrutiny plus unconfirmed SP quality plus pick-side bullpen fatigue collectively justify one tier reduction. OAK direction remains well-supported at GOLD.
